---
title: "Review Test Models"
output: html_document
date: "2024-10-10"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
setwd("/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Margaret/sex_mod_braincharts")
```

```{r, warning=FALSE}}
if(!require('pacman')) {
  install.packages('pacman')
}
pacman::p_load(data.table, ggplot2, tidyverse, stats, skimr, naniar, rlang, parallel, ggrepel, gamlss)

devtools::install_github("BGDlab/gamlssTools", force=TRUE)
library(gamlssTools)

sa_list <- readRDS("./pheno_lists/cortical_surf.rds")
ct_list <- readRDS("./pheno_lists/cortical_thickness.rds")
vol_list <- readRDS("./pheno_lists/cortical_vols.rds")
global_list <- readRDS("./pheno_lists/global_vols.rds")
sub_list <- readRDS("./pheno_lists/subcortical_vols.rds")
```

## Test Models
```{r}
glob_df <- fread("./data/csvs_by_pheno/global_vols.csv")
source("./code/gamlss_fit_funs.R")
knots <- readRDS("./code/knot_lists.RDS")
```

```{r}
df <- glob_df %>%
  select(c("sGMV", "logAge_days", "sexMale", "fs_version", "study_site", "sexMale_x_logAge")) %>%
  na.omit()

mod1 <- gamlss_mod_knots("sGMV", knots$df3, knots$df3, fam="NO")

wp.taki(mod1)

list_predictors(mod1)
```

#
read csvs
```{r}
output_fread <- 
    list.files(path="test_models", pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names=TRUE) %>% 
    lapply(fread)
names(output_fread[[1]])
```

Find lowest BICs

```{r}
#functions
clean_outputs <- function(df){
  #also getting category
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(pheno = as.character(pheno)) %>%
    mutate(pheno_cat = case_when(pheno %in% sa_list ~ "SA",
                                 pheno %in% ct_list ~ "CT",
                                 pheno %in% vol_list ~ "Vol",
                                 pheno %in% global_list ~ "Global",
                                 pheno %in% sub_list ~ "Subcort"
                                 )) %>%
    unite("dfs", degree:sigma_degree, sep="_") 
}

lowest_BICs <- function(df, number){
  df <- df %>%
    arrange(BIC) %>%
    slice_head(n = number)
}
```

```{r}
dataframe_list <- lapply(output_fread, clean_outputs)

lowest_bics <- lapply(dataframe_list, lowest_BICs, number=5) %>%
  bind_rows()

#filter further within pheno categories
lowest_bics %>%
  group_by(pheno_cat) %>%
  count(dfs) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  slice_head(n=5) %>%
  mutate(dfs=paste0("mu", sub("_", "sig", dfs)))
```

select pngs to view
```{r}
sa_sub <- sample(sa_list, 10)
sa_png_list <- c(paste(sa_sub, "mu10sig5.png", sep="_"), 
                 paste(sa_sub, "mu12sig6.png", sep="_"), 
                 paste(sa_sub, "mu8sig4.png", sep="_"))
write_lines(sa_png_list, "./test_models/top_sa_plots.txt")

ct_sub <- sample(ct_list, 10)
ct_png_list <- c(paste(ct_sub, "mu16sig16.png", sep="_"), 
                 paste(ct_sub, "mu18sig18.png", sep="_"), 
                 paste(ct_sub, "mu20sig20.png", sep="_"))
write_lines(ct_png_list, "./test_models/top_ct_plots.txt")

vol_sub <- sample(vol_list, 10)
vol_png_list <- c(paste(vol_sub, "mu16sig8.png", sep="_"), 
                 paste(vol_sub, "mu12sig6.png", sep="_"), 
                 paste(vol_sub, "mu14sig7.png", sep="_"))
write_lines(vol_png_list, "./test_models/top_vol_plots.txt")

glob_png_list <- c(paste(global_list, "mu10sig5.png", sep="_"), 
                 paste(global_list, "mu12sig6.png", sep="_"),
                 paste(global_list, "mu10sig10.png", sep="_"),
                 paste(global_list, "mu14sig7.png", sep="_"))
write_lines(glob_png_list, "./test_models/top_glob_plots.txt")

sub_sub <- sample(sub_list, 10)
sub_png_list <- c(paste(sub_sub, "mu16sig8.png", sep="_"), 
                 paste(sub_sub, "mu12sig6.png", sep="_"), 
                 paste(sub_sub, "mu20sig10.png", sep="_"),
                 paste(sub_sub, "mu22sig11.png", sep="_"))
write_lines(sub_png_list, "./test_models/top_sub_plots.txt")
```
